zh.lifeSummary: 當Serle de Dundas - Third Lord of Dundas於1165年出生在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire登達斯 卡素時，他的父親Helias de Dundas - Second Lord of Dundas30歲，母親Dama En Blanco29歲。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1214年享年49歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安登達斯 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dundas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Midlothian) and Irish (Fermanagh): habitational name from Dundas, a place near Edinburgh, Scotland, which is named from Gaelic dùn ‘hill’ + deas ‘south’.
History: A family of this name is descended from Gospatrick, Earl of March (died 1139), whose grandson was Helia de Dundas.

nameMeanings.name: Serle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Serle de Dundas - Third Lord of Dundas was born in 1165, in Dundas Castle, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, his father, Helias de Dundas - Second Lord of Dundas, was 30 and his mother, Dama En Blanco, was 29. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1214, at the age of 49, and was buried in Dundas Castle, West Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Serle de Dundas - Third Lord of Dundas est né en 1165, à Dundas Castle, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, son père, Helias de Dundas - Second Lord of Dundas, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dama En Blanco, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1214, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Dundas Castle, West Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1214 im Alter von 49 Jahren und wurde in Dundas Castle, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Serle de Dundas - Third Lord of Dundas è nato il nel 1165 nel Dundas Castle, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Helias de Dundas - Second Lord of Dundas, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Dama En Blanco, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1214, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Dundas Castle, West Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Serle de Dundas - Third Lord of Dundasが1165年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireダンダス カストルで生まれた時，父Helias de Dundas - Second Lord of Dundasは30歳，母Dama En Blancoは29歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1214年に49歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドウエスト ロスアンダンダス カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Dundas Castle, West Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언 던다스 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Serle de Dundas - Third Lord of Dundas(이)가 1165년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 던다스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Helias de Dundas - Second Lord of Dundas(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Dama En Blanco(은)는 29세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1214년 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언 던다스 카스틀에 묻혔다.

ru.Dundas Castle, West Lothian, Scotland: дундас кастл, вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Serle de Dundas - Third Lord of Dundas родился в 1165 г. в местности дундас кастл, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Helias de Dundas - Second Lord of Dundas было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dama En Blanco, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1214 г. в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности дундас кастл, вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.
